summary: First attestation-based release under the revised convention. Adds ?action=version probe and cold-start identity log to companies-house-sync. No behavioural change to the sync path.
source_commit_sha_note: Reviewed baseline named by the user. To be re-confirmed as the exact merged commit on main immediately before stamping.
release_commit_sha_note: Set to the commit created by `scripts/stamp-release.ts` writing supabase/functions/companies-house-sync/VERSION.ts. MUST be a direct descendant of source_commit_sha differing only in that one file.

artifacts.checksum_scope: function directory + imported _shared modules + deno.json / import_map if present

pre_deploy_checks: release_window.locked_at recorded; no other tool calls until verification completes

assertions: body.built_at is a valid ISO-8601 timestamp

behavioural_smoke.description: Read-only Companies House profile lookup against production; no writes, no ledger side-effects.

verification.result_policy: Both probe and behavioural_smoke must pass. Any inconclusive result (timeout, non-2xx, network failure) marks the release failed, not green.

rollback_plan.strategy: Redeploy the previous known-good release_commit_sha of companies-house-sync via the same runbook with a new release_id and rollback_of set to this release_id.
rollback_plan.note: The executor has no revert-deploy primitive; rollback is another attestation-based deploy.

blockers: companies-house-sync/index.ts does not yet short-circuit on ?action=version
Regression tests for probe shape / checksum determinism / receipt schema not yet in workspace
explicit_non_goals: No frontend publication in this release.
No behavioural change to companies-house-sync sync path.
No bulk rollout of the probe to other functions.
